Safety Tips

  • Do not make any upfront payment as inspection fee or upfront payment for rent before seeing this property or seeing the agent you contacted physically. PrivateProperty.ng is not liable for monetary transactions between you and the agents.
  • The contact agent on properties listed on PrivateProperty.ng does not represent PrivateProperty.ng. PrivateProperty.ng will not mandate agents to ask for fees upfront.

Property Detail

  • Property Type Commercial Property

  • Added 27 Jul 2024

Description

A Building Suitable for a Hotel with 80rooms & Hall,
Facilities:
500KVa Dedicated Transformer,
500Kva, 400KVA, 160KVa Generators,
Industrial Borehole,
33,000 liters Stainless steel tank, etc with car park spaces for 70cars and space for swimming pool construction
